title: Xerodraba pycnophylloides
taxonomy: Xerodraba pycnophylloides is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It belongs to the genus Xerodraba, which is a group of flowering plants endemic to the southern Andes. Xerodraba pycnophylloides is closely related to other members of the Brassicaceae family, such as those in the genera Draba and Sisymbrium. The plant's classification is further supported by molecular phylogenetic studies. Xerodraba pycnophylloides is considered a unique species within its genus due to its distinct characteristics.
